step_rationale: miRNA differentially expressed in MI; regulates inflammation and cardiomyocyte survival.
mechanism: A microRNA dysregulated in myocardial infarction that modulates inflammatory and apoptotic pathways contributing to ischemic cardiomyocyte injury.

references.title: Unlocking the potential of microRNAs: machine learning identifies key biomarkers for myocardial infarction diagnosis.
